title: Yueshop 30PCS Christmas Artificial Snowy Cypress Pine Branches with White Frosted Berry Stems, Fake Pine Picks White Holly Berry Cypress Leaves Stems for DIY Xmas Garland Wreath Home Decor
features: Artificial Snowy Pine Branches Set: You will receive 20 pcs 3D artificial pine leaves branches and 10 pcs Christmas berries stems, each stick contains 12 berries, the pine branch length 23cm/9.06'', white berry branch length 18cm/7.09'', berry diameter 1.5cm/0.6''

Quality Materials: Artificial pine needles have a delicate texture, while the artificial white berries are made of metal wire and foam balls; The surface of the foam berries is covered with a smooth varnish, and wires can be folded and bent as needed; When combined, they resemble real plants, adding beauty to your home décor

Creative Cypress Pine Branches: You can get creative with DIY projects such as wedding favors, christmas pine branches, pine needle wreaths, party decorations, photography props, and more to create a warm christmas atmosphere
Widely Use: This christmas white berry pine branch stem is the perfect decoration for Christmas, New Year, and parties, such as decorating vases, dining tables, fireplaces, doors, and other places
After Service: Yueshop pine branches no tools required can DIY the effect you would like to; If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at any time
